result.stderr:
Spriggit.Json.Oblivion 0.41.0-alpha.5+Branch.dev.Sha.81163bf19633422b907218560ed654ee399d82ce.81163bf19633422b907218560ed654ee399d82ce
2024

  -i, --InputPath         Required. Path to the Bethesda plugin

  -o, --OutputPath        Required. Dedicated folder to export mod as its text
                          representation

  -g, --GameRelease       Game release that the plugin is related to

  -p, --PackageName       Spriggit serialization nuget package name to use for
                          conversion

  -v, --PackageVersion    Spriggit serialization nuget package version to use
                          for conversion

  -t, --Threads           Maximum number of threads to use

  --Debug                 Set up for debug mode, including resetting nuget
                          caches

  -m, --ModKey            ModKey override.  If left blank, file name will be
                          used

  -c, --Check             Checks some basic correctness after serialization.
                          Not extensive.

  -d, --DataFolder        Path to the data folder to look to for mod files.
                          (Only required for separated master games, like
                          Starfield)

  -u, --ErrorOnUnknown    Whether to error on unknown fields.  Liklihood of data
                          loss is higher if turned off.

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.

Spriggit.Json.Oblivion 0.41.0-alpha.5+Branch.dev.Sha.81163bf19633422b907218560ed654ee399d82ce.81163bf19633422b907218560ed654ee399d82ce
2024

  -i, --InputPath         Required. Path to the Bethesda plugin folder as its
                          Spriggit text representation

  -o, --OutputPath        Required. Path to export the mod as its Bethesda
                          plugin representation

  -p, --PackageName       Spriggit serialization nuget package to use for
                          conversion.  Leave blank to auto detect

  -v, --PackageVersion    Spriggit serialization nuget package version to use
                          for conversion.  Leave blank to auto detect

  -t, --Threads           Maximum number of threads to use

  --Debug                 Set up for debug mode, including resetting nuget
                          caches

  -b, --BackupDays        Days to keep backup plugins in the temp folder
                          (default 30)

  -l, --Localized         Forces the build to be localized if true, or
                          unlocalized if false.  If missing, the mod's flags
                          will determine localization.

  -d, --DataFolder        Path to the data folder to look to for mod files.
                          (Only required for separated master games, like
                          Starfield)

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.

staticCommands.name: deserialize
staticCommands.description: Converts a mod from its text based representation to a binary Bethesda plugin

options.description: Path to the Bethesda plugin folder as its Spriggit text representation
Path to export the mod as its Bethesda plugin representation
Days to keep backup plugins in the temp folder (default 30)
Path to the data folder to look to for mod files.  (Only required for separated master games, like Starfield)
Set up for debug mode, including resetting nuget caches
Forces the build to be localized if true, or unlocalized if false.  If missing, the mod's flags will determine localization.
Spriggit serialization nuget package to use for conversion.  Leave blank to auto detect
Spriggit serialization nuget package version to use for conversion.  Leave blank to auto detect
Maximum number of threads to use

staticCommands.name: serialize
staticCommands.description: Converts a binary Bethesda plugin to a text based representation

options.description: Path to the Bethesda plugin
Dedicated folder to export mod as its text representation
Checks some basic correctness after serialization.  Not extensive.
Path to the data folder to look to for mod files.  (Only required for separated master games, like Starfield)
Set up for debug mode, including resetting nuget caches
Whether to error on unknown fields.  Liklihood of data loss is higher if turned off.
Game release that the plugin is related to
ModKey override.  If left blank, file name will be used
Spriggit serialization nuget package name to use for conversion
Spriggit serialization nuget package version to use for conversion
Maximum number of threads to use
